RoofingCompany.title: Roofing Company Profile
RoofingCompany.description: Details about a roofing contractor signed up on the SaaS platform

id.description: Unique identifier matching the user's Auth credential

email.description: Prime notification and billing contact email

companyName.description: Legal business name of the roofing company

stripeConnectId.description: Stripe Connect Express Account identifier for ACH payouts

stripeStatus.description: Payout channel status for ACH receipts

twilioPhoneNumber.description: Dedicated local Houston phone number assigned for SMS gateway

calendarConnected.description: Flag representing connection status with Google Calendar or native CRM

Lead.title: Homeowner Lead
Lead.description: A lead customer captured via SMS, Instagram, or Web widget, conversed and qualified by Sarah AI

homeownerUsername.description: Instagram or social media profile handle if originating via Meta API

status.description: The sales stages of Sarah's qualification funnel

neighborhood.description: Homeowner location neighborhood in Houston (e.g. Heights, Memorial)

bookingTime.description: Booked appointment slot in UTC format

transcript.description: Serialized message stream history between homeowner and Sarah AI

Transaction.title: Smart Invoice Transaction
Transaction.description: ACH transfer details generated upon winning a lead, enforcing the 2% administration skim rule

leadId.description: Reference ID to the won Lead

platformFee.description: Calculated 2% technology and platform administration fee skimmed from payout

status.description: Transfer states of the ACH billing loop

paymentMethod.description: Method of settlement (forced ACH for invoices > $2000)

description.description: Job summary description (e.g. Ridge Vent repair)

/roofing_companies/{companyId}.description: Details of the subscribed roofing company contractor

/leads/{leadId}.description: Funnel capture entries and qualifying transcripts managed by Sarah AI
